overall.description: Static first-person view of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bedroom from a video game. The scene features an unmade bed in the foreground, checkered wall tiles, and industrial shelving illuminated by moody greenish artificial lighting. No camera movement or action occurs throughout the entire clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a dimly lit cyberpunk bedroom that remains frozen in a moody, industrial atmosphere. It begins with a view of an unmade bed in the immediate foreground, establishing a sense of lived-in disorder. The gaze extends across the room to reveal checkered wall tiles and metal shelving, all bathed in a consistent greenish-cyan artificial glow. As the view lingers, the oppressive stillness of the environment persists without any shift in lighting or movement. The scene finally settles into a permanent state of quietude, emphasizing the cold, synthetic aesthetic of the apartment.
